title: pavonia pilifera
intro: Pavonia pilifera, also known as the common rose mallow or Mexican rose mallow, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family, Malvaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pavonia pilifera include its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, digestive problems, and skin conditions, due to its high content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds. Pavonia pilifera can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
